title: Fix failing agentic-store-stat.test.ts import path
description: Test file test/backends/agentic-store-stat.test.ts imports from ../../src/backends/agentic-store.js (TypeScript source) but Node.js can't resolve .js from .ts. Fix the import to use ../../dist/index.js (compiled output) matching the pattern used by other test files. This is the only failing test in the suite (1/483).
